description: Formalize parallel evidence lanes (revfactory/harness sub-agents: primary/academic/market/community + synthesis) and a structured recall layer (rohitg00/agentmemory remember/recall/forget verbs) — fan-out/fan-in research when corpus + cycle complexity justify sub-agents
notes: From ADR-008 pass-2 eval. Defer until single-worker cycle proves insufficient; harness backlog (pass 1) + agentmemory recall fold together here. evidence-graph already shipped as the index layer.
